Document.title: Document
Document.description: Represents a lab document, such as SOPs, calibration records, and training materials.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Document entity.

fileUrl.description: URL or path to the document file.

uploadDate.description: Date and time when the document was uploaded.

category.description: Category or type of the document (e.g., SOP, Calibration Record).

Sample.title: Sample
Sample.description: Represents a lab sample with its registration details.

identificacion.description: Identifier assigned to the sample by the lab.

registrationDateTime.description: Date and time when the sample was registered, in ISO format.

fechaFabricacionLote.description: Manufacturing date or lot number of the sample.

categoria.description: The category of the sample (e.g., Espuma, Tela, Colchón).

ensayosSolicitados.description: List of requested tests for the sample.

solicitudNumero.description: The request number associated with the sample.

informeNumero.description: The report number associated with the sample.

userId.description: The ID of the user who registered the sample.

Test.title: Test
Test.description: Represents a test assigned to a sample.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Test entity.

testName.description: Name of the test being performed.

assignedDate.description: Date when the test was assigned.

status.description: Current status of the test (e.g., 'Pending', 'In Progress', 'Completed').

reportId.description: Reference to Report. (Relationship: Report 1:1 Test).  ID of the report associated with this test, null if no report has been generated yet.

Report.title: Report
Report.description: Represents a test report generated for a sample.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Report entity.

generationDate.description: Date and time when the report was generated.

deviations.description: Any deviations observed during the test and their descriptions.

referenceLink.description: Link to any reference information used during the test (e.g., from online sources).

UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Stores details about a user, including their role.

name.description: The full name of the user.

role.description: The role of the user in the system.

definition.description: Stores user profile information. The document ID is the same as the Firebase Auth UID. This collection is managed by administrators.
Stores documents (SOPs, records) owned by a specific user. Access is restricted to the owning user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The ID of the user who owns the document.

definition.description: Stores samples registered by a specific user. Access is restricted to the owning user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The ID of the user who owns the sample.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore data structure is designed to be user-centric. Each user has their own collections of documents and samples, ensuring strong data isolation. Authorization is handled through path-based ownership, where security rules check if the requesting user's UID matches the {userId} in the document path. This model is simple, secure, and avoids complex queries or lookups in security rules.
